title: Teeny Totem Pop
description: Make your totem pop "teeny-tiny" for less obtrusiveness!
body:
![Comparison](https://imgur.com/cXrpBps.png) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/teeny-totem-pop) [![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/teeny-totem-pop) > #### Teeny Totem Pop shrinks the totem pop animation while keeping the original size of the totem on hand which helps you see when you're about to die. *Uh oh!*
### How it works 🧠 - The display scale is reduced by **70%** in the JSON model file of the Totem.
| Scale | Result | | ------- | --------------------------------- | | **1.0** | Vanilla Minecraft size | | **0.5** | 50% size | | **0.3** | 30% size (**Teeny Totem Pop**) | | **0.1** | Very very tiny size | ##### This resource pack is always up to date and regularly tested to check for version compatibility, new file updates, and bugs. ### License **(ARR)** 📜
License - Feel free to use, modify, or share this project in any of your modpacks or resource packs as long as proper credit is given to me. - You may not sell or use this resource pack in any way that requires payment to access it. ##### For any other concerns, feel free to message me on discord **(@Oculie)**.
